title: missing writable_root fixture
problem: metadata.writable_roots includes a path that does not exist on disk. The validator must detect and exit 3 (fatal). Used by run-plan-validator-cases.sh to assert rule (d) which checks every writable_root for existence and writability.
acceptance_criteria: Every sub-task lands as an independent PR with verifiable evidence in the PR body and CI gate passes.

tasks.title: alpha
tasks.description: Alpha sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. The writable_roots entry above points at a path that should never exist on a real system, so the validator's rule (d) must flag it as a fatal error during pre-publish.
